name: General Tso's Chicken (Nancy Hattaway)
recipeIngredient: Chicken cut into 2 inch chunks from thigh or breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat peanut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken chunks and stir-fry until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
4. In the same pan, add the dried hot red peppers and scallions. Stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
5. Return the chicken to the pan and mix well with the peppers and scallions.
6. Add minced garlic and grated ginger, stirring until fragrant.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
